nasb.text: Do we then hear about you that you have committed all this great evil by acting unfaithfully against our God by marrying foreign women?”

esv.text: Shall we then listen to you and do all this great evil and act treacherously against our God by marrying foreign women?”

cnv.text: 難道我們要聽從你們，行這大惡，娶外族的女子為妻，對我們　神不忠嗎？”

ccb.text: 我怎能听凭你们行这大恶，因娶外族女子而背叛我们的上帝呢？”
